params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context:
F5 step 3-J / Page Injection Option C empirical verify on mistral. Background: 47차 page injection Option C deployed 2026-04-30 17:37 (run_id 20260430-173711-44942). Hook: on_http_response/on_http2_response replaces text/html page-load response with synthetic warning page when (is_page_load=true AND last_pii_block_at_ms within 5min window). Cross-service path — mistral S3 gap should close via this.

TEST SEQUENCE:
T+0s: Open chat.mistral.ai incognito. Verify NO warning visible (gate not triggered yet — last_pii_block_at_ms=0).
T+30s: Send PII prompt (above). Engine [APF:block_response] service=mistral fires; last_pii_block_at_ms set.
T+45s: Reload page (Cmd+R OR navigate to /chat). Engine on_http2_response gate matches. Expected log: [APF:page_inject_h2] service=mistral. Expected client: synthetic warning page replaces SPA. Korean banner '⚠️ 보안 경고 ... 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' visible top-right.
T+50s: Reload again. Gate now FALSE (consumed). Expected: real SPA chat UI restored.

VERDICT MATRIX:
- SUCCESS: Korean banner visible after PII+reload at T+45s, real SPA after T+50s reload, no real LLM PII analysis
- PARTIAL_no_inject: page_inject log absent → check is_page_load detection or 5min expiry
- PARTIAL_style_only: banner div visible but MutationObserver not active (mistral CSP nonce strict). Acceptable for Phase 1; Phase 2 adds nonce extraction
- FAIL_real_LLM: mission regression → revert Option C
- FAIL_false_positive: page replacement on non-chat URL → tighten gate
